.github/workflows/build.yml.general_idea: Update GitHub Actions workflow to use JDK 21 for the first build job.
Update GitHub Actions workflow to use JDK 21 for the second build job.
Update GitHub Actions workflow to use JDK 21 for the third build job.

.github/workflows/codeql-analysis.yml.general_idea: Update the CodeQL analysis workflow to use JDK 21 instead of JDK 17.

.github/workflows/publish.yml.general_idea: Update the Java version in the Maven Central Repository setup step to Java 21.
Update the Java version in the general Java setup step to Java 21.

core/pom.xml.general_idea: Add explicit dependency for Jakarta Annotation API to replace the module removed from the JDK in Java 21.
core/pom.xml.why_exists: NoClassDefFoundError or compile error for jakarta.annotation classes (e.g., @Generated, @PostConstruct) which were available via the java.annotation module in JDK 8-11 but removed in JDK 21.

core/src/test/java/de/redsix/dmncheck/va.general_idea: Replace legacy List.get(0) calls with the Java 21 List.getFirst() method for improved readability.

maven-plugin/src/test/java/de/redsix/dmn.general_idea: Replace deprecated Paths.get() with Path.of() for Java 11+ compatibility.
Remove unused import java.nio.file.Paths after migration to Path.of().

plugin-base/src/main/java/de/redsix/dmnc.general_idea: Replace traditional instanceof check with pattern matching to eliminate explicit casting.
plugin-base/src/main/java/de/redsix/dmnc.before: if (element instanceof Rule) { return prettify((Rule) element); }
plugin-base/src/main/java/de/redsix/dmnc.after: if (element instanceof Rule rule) { return prettify(rule); }

plugin-base/src/test/java/de/redsix/dmnc.general_idea: Replace String.format with String.formatted for modern string interpolation.
Replace deprecated URL constructor with URI.create().toURL() to avoid deprecation warnings.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property to target JDK 21.
Bump maven-compiler-plugin version to a snapshot compatible with JDK 21.
Bump jacoco-maven-plugin version to a snapshot compatible with JDK 21.

server/pom.xml.general_idea: Add explicit dependency for Jakarta Annotation API to replace the module removed from the JDK in Java 11+.
server/pom.xml.why_exists: NoClassDefFoundError or compile error for jakarta.annotation.* classes (e.g., @Generated, @PostConstruct) which were previously available via the java.annotation module in Java 8 but removed in Java 11 and later.

server/src/main/java/de/redsix/dmncheck/.general_idea: Replace explicit cast with pattern matching instanceof to leverage Java 16+ language feature.
server/src/main/java/de/redsix/dmncheck/.after:
if (elementInstance instanceof DrgElement element) {
            return element;

validators/src/main/java/de/redsix/dmnch.general_idea: Replace the explicit filter-and-map pattern for Optional with the more concise flatMap(Optional::stream) idiom.

validators/src/test/java/de/redsix/dmnch.general_idea: Replace string concatenation with text blocks for multi-line string literals.
